title: dryopteris subtriangularis
intro: Dryopteris subtriangularis, also known as the subtriangular shield fern or subtriangular wood fern, is a species of fern in the genus Dryopteris native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory conditions. Dryopteris subtriangularis can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
